ascii

Single-quoted ASCII machine-text literals.

Aliases: '...'

Syntax: ''

Category

literal

Related

  • [textus](/corpus/textus.html)
  • [string](/corpus/string.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/literalia/ascii.fab (canonical · existing-home)

Single-quoted ASCII machine-text literals.

# literalia/ascii — '...' literals
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   pg:query

incipit {
    fixum _ route ← 'pg:query'
    nota route
}

Expected output:

pg:query
Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/literalia/ascii.fab"]
